videos.headline: Nick Evers connects with Mel Brown for a UConn TD
videos.description: Nick Evers rolls to his left and hits Mel Brown for a Huskies touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nick Evers connects with Mel Brown for a UConn TD) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Durell Robinson rushes into the end zone for UConn
videos.description: Durell Robinson extends the Huskies' lead with an 8-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Durell Robinson rushes into the end zone for UConn) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: UConn's Nick Evers scores on QB keeper
videos.description: Nick Evers keeps it for a 3-yard rushing touchdown to put UConn up 24-0.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UConn’s Nick Evers scores on QB keeper) 2024/09/21 ESHEET
